rationale: Section 25.18 governs periodic reappraisal procedures and timelines. Increasing the homestead exemption amount under §11.13(b) does not alter reappraisal duties or schedules; exemptions are applied after appraisal.
quote: Each appraisal office shall implement the plan for periodic reappraisal of property approved by the board of directors under Section 6.05(i).
_note: No conflict found; §25.18 addresses reappraisal methodology and frequency, not exemption amounts.
